# Error-Handling Checklist: PRSG-010 Harden the Hatch + O5 Monster Epics

**Purpose**: Validate that PRSG-010 error-handling, fail-closed, and recovery requirements are complete, clear, consistent, and measurable before implementation.
**Created**: 2026-06-11
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md) | [plan.md](../plan.md) | [data-model.md](../data-model.md) | [contracts/](../contracts/)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

**Depth**: Formal release gate
**Audience**: Spec author and reviewer
**Focus**: Final diff-gate stop-before-PR behavior, operator-owned typed exceptions, re-slicing resume context through PRSG-007/008/009, and fail-closed contextual probes.

## Final Gate Block Boundary

- [ ] CHK001 Are final-gate timing requirements defined before PR body generation, single PR creation/update, and multi-PR emission? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001]
- [ ] CHK002 Are block, exception, and gate-error outcomes distinguished with separate stop/proceed behavior? [Clarity, Spec §FR-002]
- [ ] CHK003 Are no-PR assertions required to prove no PR URL, PR number, head/base PR record, PR body, `gh pr create`, or `multi-pr-emission.sh` side effect was produced? [Completeness, Spec §FR-007]
- [ ] CHK004 Does the final gate state contract require every skipped PR-preparation and PR-creation operation to be represented on unexcepted block, instead of allowing a partial blocked-operation list? [Resolved - final-reviewability-gate-state.schema.json block conditional now requires all skipped PR operations]
- [ ] CHK005 Does the re-slicing packet contract require every skipped PR-preparation and PR-creation operation plus matching no-PR assertions on unexcepted block, instead of allowing a partial blocked-operation list? [Resolved - reslicing-packet.schema.json now requires all blocked operation tokens and no-PR assertions]
- [ ] CHK006 Are dry-run or recovery variants of PR creation commands covered by the same blocked-command requirement, so a blocked run cannot invoke a PR creation command as a fallback? [Resolved - Spec §FR-007 now treats any `gh pr create` variant as blocked on unexcepted block]

## Typed Exception Ownership

- [ ] CHK007 Is the preserved exception class set limited to `refactor`, `infra`, and `upgrade`? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003]
- [ ] CHK008 Are operator-owned exception requirements defined as branch-added, line-anchored, case-sensitive, committed, review-visible, non-generated CONTRACT Markdown evidence? [Clarity, Spec §FR-003]
- [ ] CHK009 Are generated, mutable, code-fence, template, PR-description, commit-message, process, and unknown-provenance exception-like sources rejected? [Coverage, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK010 Does the final gate state contract force `status: exception` to carry an honored typed exception class and review-visible evidence, and force block/error states to carry no honored exception? [Resolved - final-reviewability-gate-state.schema.json now has block/error/exception conditionals for honored exception state]
- [ ] CHK011 Are valid typed exceptions recorded with class, provenance, and the blocking gate result they override? [Completeness, Spec §FR-009]

## Re-Slicing Recovery Packet

- [ ] CHK012 Is the unexcepted block path required to create an actionable top-level gate state and JSON re-slicing packet? [Completeness, Spec §FR-005 §FR-006]
- [ ] CHK013 Does the packet requirements text include rejected and accepted exception evidence with path, line, provenance, and reason? [Completeness, Spec §FR-006]
- [ ] CHK014 Does the re-slicing packet contract require concrete PRSG-007 route/sizing context, PRSG-008 layer-plan context, and PRSG-009 handoff inputs so an operator can resume without reconstructing prior workflow state from prose? [Resolved - Spec §FR-006, data-model.md, and reslicing-packet.schema.json now require route/sizing, layer-plan, handoff path, and resume phase fields]
- [ ] CHK015 Are resume guidance requirements measurable enough for a maintainer to identify the next re-slicing action in under 5 minutes? [Measurability, Spec §SC-004]

## Contextual Probe Fail-Closed Behavior

- [ ] CHK016 Are high-confidence criteria defined separately for flag-system, release-cadence, and consumer-locality probes? [Completeness, Spec §FR-018 §FR-019 §FR-020]
- [ ] CHK017 Are weak, stale, ambiguous, fixture-only, code-fence-only, conflicting, or shallow keyword matches prohibited from `signals[]` and limited to closed-enum hints? [Completeness, Spec §FR-021]
- [ ] CHK018 Are weak contextual-probe fixtures required to prove the decisive route remains unchanged from the conservative baseline and that no decisive contextual signal is emitted? [Resolved - Plan §Split Plan now requires paired baseline-vs-weak fixtures with unchanged route, no decisive signal, and closed-enum hints]
- [ ] CHK019 Is contextual routing precedence consistent with hard-atomic and releasability precedence? [Consistency, Spec §FR-017]
- [ ] CHK020 Are mixed strong/weak probe cases covered so one strong contextual signal cannot promote unrelated weak evidence into a decisive signal? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Notes

- Gap markers identify missing or under-specified requirements and contracts, not implementation failures.

## Verification Pass

- [ ] CHK021 Does the remediated final gate state contract require all blocked PR operations on `status: block`? [Completeness, Contract final-reviewability-gate-state.schema.json]
- [ ] CHK022 Does the remediated re-slicing packet contract require all blocked PR operations and no-PR assertions? [Completeness, Contract reslicing-packet.schema.json]
- [ ] CHK023 Does the remediated spec cover dry-run and recovery variants of PR creation commands at the blocked boundary? [Coverage, Spec §FR-007]
- [ ] CHK024 Does the remediated final gate state contract require honored typed exception evidence only for `status: exception` while keeping block/error unhonored? [Consistency, Contract final-reviewability-gate-state.schema.json]
- [ ] CHK025 Does the remediated packet contract require machine-readable PRSG-007/008/009 resume context rather than prose-only handoff text? [Completeness, Contract reslicing-packet.schema.json]
- [ ] CHK026 Does the remediated plan require weak contextual-probe fixtures to prove conservative-route preservation and no decisive contextual signal? [Measurability, Plan §Split Plan]
